title: Senior Analyst Brand & Market (w/m/d) - Corporate Brands
description:
TASKS WITH IMPACT


You monitor all relevant KPIs for demand forecasting and stock availability across warehouses and stores and translate insights into actionable adjustments of order forecasts
You develop and manage order volume planning tools, consolidate demand inputs from countries, and prepare decision-making materials for budget approvals
You manage the full stock lifecycle and ensure accurate master data to enable optimal replenishment proposals
You calculate order requirements based on sell-out planning at SKU level, considering store and warehouse coverage, lead times, and product-specific requirements
You proactively optimize stock levels and initiate measures to reduce excess inventory and manage product delisting in a timely manner
You establish and maintain rolling forecasts for strategic suppliers and align regularly with Purchasing and partners to optimize delivery performance
You drive projects to enhance planning and forecasting approaches, including leveraging additional data sources and improving ordering and replenishment models


Your Skills

We take a competency-based and fair approach to recruiting, that´s why we look beyond your experience to understand how you create impact, grow through change, and collaborate for success.

Alongside these competencies, we’re looking for the following skills:


You have completed a degree in business administration, supply chain management, or a comparable field
You ideally bring several years of professional experience in supply chain, demand planning, or order management
You are highly proficient in Excel as well as in business intelligence and reporting tools
You communicate fluently in English; German language skills are considered a plus
You analyze complex data sets in a structured way and derive clear, actionable insights
You handle complex topics confidently and structure your work independently and transparently
You work with a strong focus on accuracy and ensure high data quality in your analyses and reports


Your Benefits

🚀 Your personal development: we want you to grow with us. Become part of our mentoring program, use our e-learning platforms and benefit from many other individual development opportunities.

✔️ Open feedback culture: half-yearly meetings & performance reviews (#DOUGLASDialogue)

🌴 30 days of vacation per year

📍 Would you like a hybrid working model? We offer a balance between mobile working and office days in a collaborative environment. (approx. 8 days/month)

🧘‍♀️Whether it's fitness, mental health or preventative care - with Wellhub and heycare we support you holistically in your well-being.

🐾 Whether you’re working or taking a break - your dog is always welcome in our office.

🍒 Cherry on top: You get our employee discount both online and in-store. On top of that, you get further discount opportunities thanks to our corporate benefits.

🧃 In-house canteen & bistro, as well as free drinks

🎉 A positive and motivating environment & celebrating successes at regular company events such as DOClub, summer party, Women's Day, etc

DO YOU RECOGNIZE YOURSELF?

Then become part of our international company and apply, stating your salary expectations and possible starting date.

As an international employer, we stand for equal opportunities and diversity. We therefore welcome applications from mothers, fathers, people with disabilities and people from the LGBTQIA+ community. Please let us know if, for example, we should use a gender-neutral pronoun, if you need barrier-free access to our offices or if we should allow more time for the application process.

We look forward to hearing from you!
